use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF CHRONIC OBSTRUCTIVE PULMONARY DISEASE (COPD), CHRONIC BRONCHITIS OR EMPHYSEMA

indications.text:
1.1 Maintenance Treatment of COPD
STRIVERDI RESPIMAT is a long-acting beta-agonist indicated for long-term, once-daily maintenance bronchodilator treatment of airflow obstruction in patients with
2
chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD), including chronic bronchitis and/or emphysema.
